hero.title: Lapacho – Simple by nature.
hero.subtitle: Clear, fast orders with no mistakes. All through WhatsApp.

what.title: What is Lapacho?
what.p1: Lapacho is an automated assistant that takes orders via WhatsApp, organizes them, and sends them ready to prepare.
what.p2: No need to install anything or learn new tools.
what.p3: Your business works the same, but without the chaos.

simplicity.title: Total simplicity
items: No need to change how you work

time.title: Real time savings
items: The system builds the complete order

single.title: One WhatsApp number
single.desc: All stores in one place, no searching for phone numbers.

fast.title: Fast and simple ordering
fast.desc: The bot builds your order in seconds, hassle-free.

tracking.title: Automatic tracking
tracking.desc: Notifications: received, preparing, ready, on the way.

how.title: How it works
steps: The store receives the order on WhatsApp
Updates the status with one click

cta.title: Simplify your business today.
cta.subtitle: Less chat. Fewer errors. More time to grow.
